title: Three Jetties Gourmet Restaurant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Three Jetties Gourmet Restaurant''' was a dining establishment in [[The Three Jetties]] district of [[Bartyn's Landing]], a city of [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]. The Restaurant officially served only with previous date, although certain well-dressed individuals managed to impress the doorman. The head chef, the [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] perfectionist [[Vondri Deeq]], supervised every dish as of [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].

[[Guther Bartyn]], [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of Bartyn's Landing, owned an 80% of this restaurant; and the Restaurant served only products from the [[Bartyn family]] business, [[Bartyn Gourmet Delicacies]]. This was not of the liking of working sailors, who would have preferred the Bartyns to stay outside the Three Jetties District.
